This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] noopener-allow-popups ensures that the opener cannot script the openee, but further popups with no COOP can access their opener: noopener-allow-popups/restrict-properties
  step_wait_func: Opener popup.window becomes null Timed out waiting on condition
[FAIL] noopener-allow-popups ensures that the opener cannot script the openee, but further popups with no COOP can access their opener: restrict-properties/noopener-allow-popups
  assert_false: Opener is null expected false got true
Harness: the test ran to completion.
